subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #036 The Five Divisions of Spirit
subcodes.first_line: Know that in general there are five divisions of spirit. First is the vegetable spirit
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدانکه کلیه ارواح پنج قسم است اول روح نباتی و آن قوه‌ئیست که از ترکیب عناصر
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @power of the mind over nature, @The Holy Spirit, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @spiritual springtime
